# dantesito

> Hacker · 🇦🇷. Systems engineering student, Ethereum & cryptography enthusiast, security researcher.

Member of [The Red Guild](https://theredguild.org) and co-founder of [HackTandil](https://hacktandil.org).

## Profile

- [Complete professional profile](/agents.md): Full bio, projects, talks, and background (recommended starting point)
- [HTML homepage](/): Human-friendly version with same content

## Blog

- [Blog index](/blog/): All technical writing and research
- [Individual posts as Markdown](/blog/): Add .md to any blog URL (e.g. /blog/devcon-sea.md)

## Optional

- [RSS Feed](/rss.xml): For keeping up with new posts

---

**For LLMs**: Start with `/agents.md` for the richest context about me, then explore specific blog posts as needed. All content is written to be both human and machine readable.
